parsed.availability_comment: Recent ICC squad listing shows him active for Sri Lanka in February 2026, with no later adverse news located.
parsed.availability_note: No current injury/suspension/tournament-conflict signal found; available for full IPL window.
parsed.followup_reason: Availability is clear enough; only exact pecking-order vs Ngidi/Jamieson remains team-selection dependent.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Squad balance makes him a backup overseas seamer unless conditions or availability change.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Strong overseas-slot pressure at DC: Starc is the lead quick, while Stubbs/Miller/Duckett compete for batting slots and Ngidi/Jamieson offer pace alternatives.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Named in DC squad but appears behind Starc/Ngidi and other overseas combinations; conditions-based reserve pacer.
